name: My Rich Little Brother
overview: In college, Wei Yingying meets Xin Zhengzheng, a seventeen-year-old with the mind of a child due to trauma. Years later, Xin Zhengzheng pursues Wei Yingying despite their different backgrounds and his arranged marriage.

trailers.title: My Rich Little Brother | Trailer | Cradle snatcher's Love with Her Handsome Boy | 跨越时光只爱你 | ENG SUB
